mnemonics: Knight's Neural Approach Is Generally Helpful (K.N.A.I.G.H. - a play on 'Knight' and the authors' names)

keyPoints: Knight and Nair are authors known for their work in artificial intelligence, likely referenced for a specific model, theory, or textbook.
